show.title: Detailed View
show.subtitle: View the campaign details

show.contentLockedHint: To edit the content (title, description or files), you must unpublish the post from all platforms.
show.approvedEditWarningHint: This publication has already been approved. If you make changes, it will return to 'Pending' status and require a new approval.

locking.userMessage: {{user}} is editing this publication <1>from {{browser}}</1>. Your changes cannot be saved to avoid conflicts.

validation.descMin: Description must have at least 10 characters
validation.hashtagValid: Hashtags must be separated by commas
validation.scheduledMinDifference: The date must be at least 1 minute from the current time
validation.scheduledAtRequired: Schedule date is required if global schedule is enabled
validation.recurrenceDaysRequired: Select at least one day for weekly recurrence
validation.durationErrors: Fix the duration errors before saving.
validation.recurrenceEndDateRequired: End date is required for recurring publications
validation.pollDurationRequired: Poll duration must be between 1 and 168 hours
validation.imageRequired: You must add at least one image or video
validation.scheduleRequired: You must schedule a date for all selected networks or set a global date

schedule.title: Date for all networks
schedule.description: Set a single date to publish on all selected social networks at once.
schedule.instantWarning: To publish now, use the Publish button after saving.

recurrence.title: Repeat publication (Recurrence)
recurrence.locked_desc: Upgrade your plan to schedule automatic repetitions (every X days/weeks) for your publications.
recurrence.end_date_required: End date is required for recurring publications
recurrence.preview_note: These dates are estimated and will be reflected in the calendar when saved.
recurrence.select_accounts_desc: Select which networks will publish recurrently. The others will only publish once.
recurrence.single_account_note: This network will publish recurrently according to the configuration.

edit.title: Edit Publication
edit.subtitle: Update the existing publication
edit.name: Name
edit.accountMissingText: This publication was posted on an account ({{account}}) that is no longer connected. Editing it will create a new version for your current account(s). Proceed?
edit.configurationLockedHint: You need approval to configure networks and scheduling. Request a review first.
edit.configurationLockedHintAdmin: You must approve the publication before configuring networks.
edit.contentLockedHint: To edit the content (title, description or files), you must unpublish the post from all platforms.
edit.approvedEditWarningHint: This publication has already been approved. If you make changes, it will return to 'Pending' status and require a new approval.
edit.pendingReviewWarningHint: This publication is awaiting approval. You cannot edit it until it is approved or rejected.

locking.sessionMessage: You have this publication open on <1>{{browser}}</1>. Close the other session to edit here.

approvals.noPendingDesc: Great! All publications are up to date.
approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.historySubtitle: Logs of status changes and reviews

comments.title: Internal Comments
comments.noComments: No comments yet. Start the conversation!
comments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
comments.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? This action cannot be undone.

publish.title: Publish
publish.noCompatibleAccounts: No accounts compatible with this content type.
publish.changeContentType: Change the content type or connect compatible accounts.
publish.author: @Alejandro Olarte
publish.oauth1_video_message: This account needs OAuth 1.0a credentials to upload videos

modal.title: Unpublish
modal.message: Are you sure you want to unpublish? This will remove the publication from this platform.

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel publication?
cancelConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to cancel this publication? Platforms that have already been published will not be affected.

pendingReviewBanner.title: Publication Under Review
pendingReviewBanner.message: This publication has already been sent for review. An administrator must approve it before it can be published.

rejectedBanner.title: Publication Rejected
rejectedBanner.message: This publication has been rejected by {{name}}.
rejectedBanner.footer: Make the necessary adjustments and resubmit for review.

alreadyPublishedBanner.title: Active Publication
alreadyPublishedBanner.message: This publication is already published on the following accounts:
alreadyPublishedBanner.hint: You can publish to additional accounts by selecting them below.

incompatibleAccountsBanner.title: Incompatible Accounts
incompatibleAccountsBanner.message: The following accounts are not compatible with the content type "{contentType}":
incompatibleAccountsBanner.hint: These accounts will not appear in the publishing options.

publishedInOtherAccountBanner.title: Published in Different Account
publishedInOtherAccountBanner.message: This publication was published on a {{platform}} account that is no longer connected.
publishedInOtherAccountBanner.hint: You can publish to the current account by selecting it below. The previous publication will remain on the disconnected account.

preview.title: Preview
preview.disclaimer: Preview is an approximation. Actual appearance may vary by platform.
preview.notAvailable: Preview not available for this platform

validation.durationErrors: Fix the duration errors before saving.

validation.reel_requires_video_only: Reels require video files only (no images)

validation.story_requires_one: Stories require exactly 1 media file (image or video)

validation.cross_platform_incompatibility: The selected content type is not supported by all selected platforms

validation.media_required: Media files are required for this content type
